name: Race vs Rest of City
description: Compares each racial/ethnic group's rate to the rest of the city, broken down by overall population, female, and male. Produces one chart per race group (typically 3).

text_patterns.title: {disease}† for {race} Residents, {years}
text_patterns.label: All {disease}
text_patterns.description: For the combined years {years}, the age-adjusted overall {disease_lower} rate for {race} residents of {geography} ({rate}) was {comparison} in comparison to the rate for the rest of {geography} ({ref_rate}). The age-adjusted overall {disease_lower} rate for female {race} residents of {geography} ({f_rate}) was {f_comparison} in comparison to the rate for the rest of female {geography} residents ({f_ref_rate}).
text_patterns.description_with_male: The age-adjusted overall {disease_lower} rate for male {race} residents of {geography} ({m_rate}) was {m_comparison} in comparison to the rate for the rest of male {geography} residents ({m_ref_rate}).
